
<h1 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">Meet the Team</h1>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/Kotikot.jpg){.rounded-circle style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;"}

### Susan Kotikot

Principal Investigator

Susan leads our research initiatives with a focus on spatial data science and ecological modeling, driving our technical direction and project strategy.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/Akanga.jpg){.rounded-circle style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;"}

### Donald Akanga

Senior Geospatial Analyst

Donald specializes in robust data architecture and geospatial processing, ensuring that every project is built upon a foundation of data integrity.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/Wanyama.jpg){.rounded-circle style="width: 200px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover;"}

### Dan Wanyama

Postdoctoral Researcher

Dan focuses on the intersection of ecological modeling and statistical analysis, helping us turn complex landscape data into actionable insights.
:::

:::
